titleStmt.title: SII 35.116: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 116. (A.R. No. 24 of 1950-51.) BOMBAY, BOMBAY DISTRICT.

summary.p: This inscription refers to the reign of Sāḷuva-Nāyaka and is dated Śaka 1485, Dundubhi, Chaitra śu. 12, Monday, Magha corresponding to A.D. 1562, March 16, f.d.t. 76, f.d.n. 74.

It records the construction of a shrine at Gerasoppe by the chief Sāḷuva-Nāyaka, son of Bemmarasi-Nāyikiti and Viṭṭappa-Nāyaka, and the consecreation of Śānti-Tīrthaṅkara therein and records gifts of lands made to the same by the chief. It also refers to the rule of the queen Chenna Bhairādēvi over the provinces of Nagire, Haive, Tuḷu and Koṅkaṇa on the west coast. Reviewed in ASR for 1924-25, p. 115.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ jīyātrailōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ .
Asti kōravadēśēsminnagarī nagarītica tatrānēkamahīmahījātā śītāṁśuvaṁśajāḥ . tatsaṁtānēnēbhasama śubhagāpā
calāṁbā manōjña śrīdēvēṁdrādhipati mithunē caṁnabhairāṁbikāyāṁ . bhallātavyāṁ purī śaśikalāsaṁnibhā dharmmavārdhē
yāsāṁ rakṣatyamalanagarīmukhyarājyaṁ supūjyaṁ tatpādapadmōpajīvi nagarī siṁhāsanēśānvaya janita mahānupadēvēṁdra mānyaḥ svaguṇavrāta
daihika parasadbaṁdhu mitrānuṣaṁgaḥ jagati sannāyakāgrēsarapaṭubhaṭasadviṭṭapakhyātma jāta śubhagaḥ śrī sāḷuvākhyaḥ svavevirahitarata sādhujīyānmanōjñaḥ [.]
yisōdidaradaḍḍikaraḷuvē pūrṇṇagoḷa nāḍādiganeṁba cāṭu bhaṭaṁ kōṭiśiraḥ kavacaṁgaḷeyda maigūḍada munna paṭu paṟeyappine gaṁkāva
roḷa kōḷūdahanuṁ peṟūtivūḷaguḷa bhaṭarkaḷoḷāvanādoḍaṁ . baiharoḷagudayisida sōdaramāvaṁ mahānubhāvaṁ rāmaṁnā
riyanāyakanādaṁdevitara baḷige bhūṣaṇamene tāṁ . Ātaṁgaḷiya sāḷuvanītaṁ nāyaka suratnanenipaṁ tanagiṁtātaṁ viṭṭapanāyakanātaṁ nagari surā
jyanṛpa suprītaṁ . haḷadipuradoḷage bīdiyabaḷige nabhōmaṇiya māḷkiyiṁ pesarvaḍedā viḷasadviṭṭhapanāykaniḷegesevaṁgātmajāta sāḷuva nī
taṁ . yiṁtappa sāḷuvanāyakaṁ Ācaṁdrārka mahīdhara niścalaghanasphūrjaccilānirmmatā dinōkta viśiṣṭalakṣaṇamahāsthaṁbhōllasaṁtprastaraṁ . muktaśrī
vanitāvivāhavilasanmāṁgalyagēhōpamaṁ viśvāsīcanakaṁ vidāpuvilasaccaitālayaṁ bha taḥ . śrī tatra śrī śāṁtināthārkkaṁ jaganmitraṁtamōnudaṁ sāḷu
vākhyasatāṁ mukhyaḥ prativāpitavānsudhīḥ tatpādamūlasannityanaimittikamahōtsava . kṣētraṁ sādhuvitīryā sāḷuvō jayati sphuṭaṁ . svasti
śrīmahāmaṁḍaḷēśvara sāḷuva caṁnnabhairādēvi Aṁmanavarū nagarirājya haive tuḷa koṁkaṇa muṁtāda rājyavanū pratipālisutaṁ Iddaṁdina śālivāhana saka
varṣa 1485 ya duṁdubhisaṁvatsara caitra śu 10 caṁdravāra maghānakṣatra śubhalagnadalu śrīmatu haḷadipuradali hujjarabaṁḍiya baḷiya viṭṭappanāyka
bhairava hujjara dēUtara baḷi taṁgi beṁmarsināykati viṭṭappanāyka baṁmarsināṁykatiyavarige puṭṭida sāmaṁta
cūḍāmaṇiyāda sāḷuva ya caturbhujada bastiya pūrvvadiśābhāgada mukhavāgi caityālayavanu kaṭṭisi
śāṁtitīrtthaṁkaranūnaṁ pratiṣṭheyanu dalli nanna hesarali naṁma nitya naimittika muṁtāda dharmmakke biṭṭukoṭṭa vṛttigaḷa śilāśāsanada bhāṣākra
maveṁteṁdare kūṇakaḷi teṟava kuḷiyāḷagaṇa haṇa dake naṁma taṁdeya makkaḷu daivarasi ciṁmarasa saha prāku Arasugaḷalli mūlava koṁḍu sirahasigeya
liha kūṁḍanāthana pramāṇina navage pedabhāgiya teṟanū Arasugaḷa kayya kuḷamūlavanu koṁḍu yī dharmakke biḍu dēvasva śāsanāṁkitavāgi biṭṭu koṭṭa sthaḷaṁga
ḷavivara maraḷiyagadde muḍe 2 hiriya baṁkadali Adake baṁda bāgiya Aḍiya haraḷagadde mu 1 Araṇiya kaṁḍa bānalli saṁda gadde mu 1 mattaṁ Araṇiya kaṁḍa bāna mē
le 80 vaḷi mu 1 lli kaṇikaḍahina yeli paṭṭiya gadde mu 1 mayaduramāḍaṇakke mu 1 valavina mugaḷiyalli gadde mu 1 Aḍiya kaṁḍa gadde mu 1 Aṁtū suggigadde mūḍe hannoṁ
danū [I]dakke baṁda mareya gadde saha yivakke baṁda mane mane tāṇa teṁginahittilu meluneyarvvoṁgoṁḍu sahavāda samasta kṣattiyellavanū kaṭṭisida bastiya śāṁtitīrtthaṁ
ranātha mūladalli naṁna hesarali naḍeva nitya naimittikada dharmakke naṁna trikaraṇa śuddhiyiṁ hiraṇyōdaka dhārāpūrvakamācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi dharmakke biṭu
koṭṭanu Ī dharmakke biṭṭu koṭṭa vṛttigaḷiṁda varuṣa 1 kke kaṭṭi bahagēṇibhatta pereya mū 140 Ā teṁginahittiliṁ baha Ivakke naḍasuva dharmma dēvara
Amṛtapaḍige varuśa . 1 kke bhta (bhatta) periya 45 Akṣatege bhta (bhatta) mu 15 yeraḍu hottina kṣīrābhiṣēkakke bhta ma 24 bha Aḍake yali gaṁdha dhūpakke bhta
mu 12 A hnika 3 kke bhta mu 23 Aṁtu bhta pereyanū nālvattakkeṟu bareda pramāṇina dharmava māḍi caityālayadiṁdrare nōḍi naḍesi baharu mattaṁ ppā
ṇiṁya vūḷage taṁda mudināyana kaiyalli mūlava koṁḍāḷutaṁ Idda sādhana pramāṇina suḷiya gūḷiya gadde hāne
Idakke baṁda kaṇaliya gadde hāne 10 gadde mūḷa hāne 5 kke kaṭṭida gēṇi bha piriya mu 25 kke Ā nāgarsi Ākeya taṁma jaṭṭeyaṇṇana vi
śāṁtitīrttaṁkara bha pere mū 20 dīvigeya yaṁṇege bha mū 1 Adakke baṁda mane teṁginahittiliṁda kaḍida kāyi 160 yī vṛttigaḷanu ka
mūlavāgi koṁḍu yī hola yī dharmmakkū śāsanāṁkitavāgi biṭṭu koṭṭinu nāykana magaḷu
yōja vaḷiya ge mūlava koṁḍu jōgiya maṇucina kaṇiveya gadde nālkakke saṁbhāra gadde mu voṁdakke kajjada gēṇiya bhta pere mū 12 yī
raḍu mūḍe bhta danīḷavanu sthaḷamūla kuḷamūlava koṁḍu namma māva sāḷuvanāykara bastiya śāṁtitīrtthaṁkara pādamūladali naṁna hesarali nitya naḍeva
dhāreya dharmakke nānū naṁna trikaraṇa śudhiyiṁda dharmakke biṭṭu koṭṭenu mattaṁviṭappanāykara maga liṁgaheggaḍeyā kāvagoḷage mūlava koṁḍāḷutta Idu
giya mūvatu mūḍe bhtada sthalaṁgaḷanu kuḷamūḷava koṁḍu naṁma Aṇṇa sāḷuva nāykaṁ bastiya śāṁtitīrtthaṁkara pādamūladali naṁna tāyi bīrananāyka
caṁmarasināykatiyavara hesarali hāladhāreya dharmakke nānunaṁnatrikaraṇaśuddhiyiṁda dharmakke biṭṭu koṭṭenu mattaṁ sāḷuvanāykara
gāroḷage sthaḷamūla kulamūlava koḍuva sādhana pramāṇa māḍi bhtada sthalaṁgaḷuAdakke baṁda samasta vṛttiyanu nānu kaṭṭisida bastiya śāṁ
tīrtthaṁkarige nāgiyabe marsināykarige paṁcamiya haṁnneraḍaṟalli naḍeva paṁcāmratābhiṣēkada dharmakke nānu nanna trikaraṇa śuddhiyiṁ
dēva ke koṭṭa biṭṭu koṭṭa mattaṁ mācaṇanāya nāykanu ḷiya voḷage tānu mūlavāgi terumānyavāgi muḍe gaddeya nela
mane lliyā dharmakke luvanu tegedukoṁḍu yī dōṁṭayā gaddeya nelavannu sāḷuvanāykara bastiya śāṁtitīrtthaṁkara pādamūladalli A
hasara hāladhāreya dharmakke Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi biṭṭukoṭṭa viṭṭapanāykara maga liṁgaheggaḍeya ma yalli haḍavina sarvvasva
voḷage nālku mūḍe Akkiya sthaḷaṁgaḷanu namma Aṇṇa sāḷuvanāyakaru kaṭṭisida bastiya śāṁtitīrtthaṁkara pādamūladalli naṁma taṁde viṭappanāykara hesa
ralli nīvu paḍeva hāladhāreya dharmakke teṟu mānyavāgi nannatrikaraṇaśuddhiyiṁ dharmakke biṭṭu koṭṭenu mattaṁ kaṁṭhiya beṇaseṭṭiya makkaḷu saṁṇayavīra
na caṁmayanavaru sāḷuvanāyakaru kaṭṭisida bastiya śāṁtitīrtthaṁkara pādamūladalliniṁtu hiriya taṁde boṁmaṇaseṭṭiya hesarinalli nitya naḍeva hāladhāreya
kkegaḷavaṁ ya voḷage [Ā] boṁmalaseṭṭiya Arakeyiṁ baṁdagaḷa vaṁkeyalli nāṭamūlavāgi Āḷuttaṁ yida sthaḷaṁgaḷa mēle 12 mūḍhe bhtavanu
māṭeyiṁna caṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi biṭṭu bahevu yeṁdu barasida dharmmaśāsana mattaṁ sāḷuvanāyakanu [Ā]hāradhānadharmakke biṭṭu
koṭṭa sthaḷaṁgaḷa vivara pāḍa holadoḷage Aruma siriyāralli kaṇanuṁ kallappanāykara makkaḷu hiriya dēvarāya Avana taṁgi to
yavara kaiyalli mūlava koṁḍu Āhāradānakke biṭṭu koṭṭa Aḍiya sareya sthaḷaṁgaḷige gaḍi mūḍalu Aḍakeya kuḷiya hegaḍeya vṛttiya hāḷi
teṁkalu nīreṟakavoḷagāgi yikkida kallu gaḍi paḍuvalu mīḷiya māgiya ḍana vṛttiyalli Ikkida kallu gaḍibaḍagalu heṟavaḍiya kēsavana vṛttiya kallu
hoḷegaḍi Iṁtī nālku gaḍiyiṁ voḷagana sugimakke gademū 4 mattaṁ papāpatiya gade mū 1 sāviya gade mū 1 yige makka saha mū
ḍe gade Idake baṁda sarvvāṁgōḍu sahavāda samasta vṛtti yellada hāmaṁdu haḍavalarttha vanū koṭṭu mūlavanokkoṁḍu sarvabādapa
rihārārtavāgi Arasugaḷa vyaya kuḷamūlava māḍikoṁḍu Ī dharmakke biṭṭu koṭṭa sthaḷaṁgaḷige kaṭṭida gēṇi bhta mū 70 yeppattu mūḍe bhta sthalagaḷa madēva
śāsanāṁkitavāgi nānu kaṭṭisida śāṁtitīrtthaṁkara bastiyalli 20 voṁdu raḍa tapasvigaḷāhāradāna dharmakke nānu naṁna trikaraṇaśuddhiyāgi biṭṭu koṭṭa dharmastaḷaṁgaḷa vivara
saliyoḷage se ṇaseṭṭiya boṁmaṇiseṭṭiya kayyalli nānu mūlava māḍikoṁḍa dharmmastaḷaṁgaḷa mu gadibījava mā
na gaddeya sthaḷa mūṟu mūḍe bayaḷana gadde staḷa 1 mūḍeya 20 hāne Ubhayaṁ 4 mūḍeya 20 hāne gareya sthaḷaṁgaḷu I
ne baṁda mane manedāri nīrudāri sarvvāṁgūḍusahavāda samasta vṛttiyellavanu sāḷuvanāyakara bastiya śāṁtitīrtthaṁkara
pādamūladalli naḍeva dharmakku bhaṁḍārigaḷa dharmakkū Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi biḍu dēvasva śāsanāṁkitavāgi sāḷuvanāyaka
dumarasināyakatiyavaru tāvu tamma trikaraṇaśuddhiyiṁda yī dharmma biṭṭu koṭṭaru yī biṭṭu koṭṭa dharmasthalaṁga
kaṭṭida gēṇi bhatta pereya 60 mūḍe bhatta Ī bhattakke Ā bastiya Iṁdraru naḍesuva dharmada vivara bastiya bāḍā gaḷi
laṁ pratiyalli 30 mūḍe bhattavanu koṭṭu baharu dasa kṣaṇada hattu dinada dharmmakke mūḍe bhattavanu tegedu ko
Ā bastiya Iṁdraru caṁnabhairādēviAṁmanavaru kuḷamūlavāgi biṭṭu koṭṭa dharmmanārana pramāṇiya Ā beḷiya hadi
nāṟu haṇavige Avara hesara hāladhāreya dharmavanu Ā bastiya Iṁdrare Ācaṁdrārkkavāgi naḍesi baharu yeṁdu barasida dharma
śāsana mattaṁ jaṁṭukanāyakana maga narasaṇanāyakanu volagaḷiyoḷage pra hālotteyāgi Āḷuttaṁ Idu teṁ
melaṟamūlagaḷāda vīraṇanāykana voḍa huṭṭidaḷāda dēvarasināykatiya kayalli teṟumānyavāgi Ācaṁdrārkkasthā
yiyāgi dharmava biḍuva nānu Anuguṇavāgi mūlava māḍikoṁḍu dharmmakke biṭṭu koṭṭa dharmasthalaṁgaḷa vivara savalagaddeya
1 mattaṁ baṁga gaddeya sthala 3 mattu 3 mattaṁ hēriya gaddeya sthaḷa samānavoṁdarttha mattaṁ sāreya gaḍi gaddeya sthala samāna voṁdarttha
sthalaṁgaḷu sabaraha sthalaṁgaḷige baṁda mane ṭhāUnu taṁmaṇaseṭṭiya gaḍiya paḍuva diśābhāgada mane ṭhā sahasarvvāṁga
salāvāda samasta vṛttiyellavanu biḍu dēvasva śāsanāṁkitavāgi sāḷuvanāyakara bastiya śāṁtitīrtthaṁkara
mūladali na hesarali naḍeva hāladhāreya dharma paṁcakalyāṇada dharmma nānu naṁga trikaraṇaśuddhiyiṁda dharmakke bi
ṭṭu koṭṭenu Ī biṭṭu koṭṭa sthaḷaṁgaḷige kaṭṭida gēṇi varuṣa 1 kke bhatta hoṟa . 14 . Akṣaradalli hadinālkuvare hoṁda
bhattakke naḍesuva dharmada vivara nanna hesaralu naḍeva hāladhāreya dharmakke bhatta ho 5 . paṁca kalyāṇada dharmakke bha
tta hore vubhayaṁ 14 . bhattavanu Ā bastiya Iṁdrarē taṁma hesara nu koṭṭu tegedu koṁḍu dharmavanu Ācaṁdrārkka
sthāyiyāgi naḍesi baharu yeṁdu narasaṇanāyakanu biṭṭu koṭṭa dharmma bīrakanāykati caṁmarasi naṁjiya
boṁmaṇaseṭṭi bhairasināykati dēvarasiyavarū hāladhāreya dharmmakke biṭṭu koṭṭa nādana pramāṇina sāliṁgaḷi
baha bhattavanu [Ī] bastiya Iṁdraru tegedukoṁḍu Ī śāṁtīśvararige Aṣṭami caturdaśigaḷalli ge 1 kke bhadeya 1 vivara
dalli laṁbā tā tavanū Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi nirisi baharu Arasanāyakara bha taṁmiyā
sida sāsanada vivara nānu ṟikeya voḷage mūlavāgi Āḷutta Idda pramāṇina tūbina gadde kūḷaguṁḍi gadde
sa gadde saṁ muḍagana gadde Ava baṁ kaṇi muni munisahāyeṁṭu mūḍe gaddeyivake baṁda teṁginahittilu saha
samasta vṛttiyallavanu sāḷuvanāyakaru bastiyalu Iha jana munigaḷavoṁdu dēvasva
kitavāgi narana trikaraṇaśuddhiyiṁda biṭṭu koṭṭenu sāḷuvanāyakara makkaḷu bairarasiyavaru
na naṁma taṁde sāḷuvanāykaru tamage māḍikoṭṭa sā si pramāṇina Artthavṛtti Iṁda sāḷuva nāyka
bastiya jīrṇnōddhārakke varṣa 1 kke varāha Eraḍu Ā bastiya riya grāsakke tereya Ippattu mūḍe bhatta
yalu Ācaṁdrārkkasthāyiyāgi naṁma saṁtati paraṁpareyāgi koṭṭu yaṁdu mi bhairarasiya
śrī śrī śrī
Digital edition of SII 35.116 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
